source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 青海6.3级地震 游客正拍照忙蹲下
topics.official_english: 6.3-Magnitude Earthquake Strikes Qinghai; Tourists Caught Off Guard
topics.why_hot: Natural disaster with immediate human interest; tourists' reactions add a relatable angle.
topics.share_angle: Explain earthquake preparedness and China's seismic monitoring systems.

topics.chinese_topic: 今年高校新增了这几个专业
topics.official_english: Chinese Universities Add New Majors for 2026
topics.why_hot: Education policy affecting millions of students and parents; reflects economic and tech trends.
topics.share_angle: Discuss which new majors align with future job markets (AI, green energy, etc.).

topics.chinese_topic: 中国丝瓜瓤现身旧金山街头 5美元1个
topics.official_english: Chinese Loofah Sponges Sold in San Francisco for $5 Each
topics.why_hot: Cultural export and economic curiosity; shows global demand for traditional Chinese products.
topics.share_angle: Explore the global market for traditional Chinese household items and sustainability.

topics.chinese_topic: 为何一到世界杯英国就变成了英格兰
topics.official_english: Why Does the UK Become England During the World Cup?
topics.why_hot: Sports trivia that sparks curiosity; explains a common confusion for Chinese audiences.
topics.share_angle: Clarify the difference between UK, Great Britain, and England in sports contexts.

topics.chinese_topic: 全球算力版图被中国小城改写
topics.official_english: Small Chinese City Reshapes Global Computing Power Map
topics.why_hot: Technology and economic development; highlights China's rise in computing infrastructure.
topics.share_angle: Profile the city (e.g., Gui'an or similar) and its role in data centers and AI.

topics.official_english: Annual Interest on 10,000 Yuan Deposit Falls to 9,500 Yuan
topics.why_hot: Personal finance concern; reflects low interest rates and economic trends.
topics.share_angle: Explain why bank interest rates are dropping and what alternatives exist for savers.

topics.chinese_topic: 梅西将成首位出战六届世界杯的球员
topics.official_english: Messi Set to Become First Player to Appear in Six World Cups
topics.why_hot: Historic sports milestone; appeals to global football fans.
topics.share_angle: Highlight Messi's career longevity and the significance of this record.

topics.chinese_topic: 造谣“上海地铁顶部坠落”者被拘
topics.official_english: Rumor Spreader Detained for False Shanghai Metro Ceiling Collapse Claim
topics.why_hot: Public safety and misinformation; shows legal consequences of spreading rumors.
topics.share_angle: Discuss China's laws against online rumors and how to verify information.
